allow: PowerShell($agents = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File "d:\\agent-project\\灵酝skmint\\.agents" | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("d:\\agent-project\\灵酝skmint\\.agents", ""\) }; $claude = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File "d:\\agent-project\\灵酝skmint\\.claude" | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("d:\\agent-project\\灵酝skmint\\.claude", ""\) }; Write-Host "=== Only in .agents ==="; $agents | Where-Object { $_ -notin $claude }; Write-Host "=== Only in .claude ==="; $claude | Where-Object { $_ -notin $agents })

PowerShell($files = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File "d:\\agent-project\\灵酝skmint\\.claude\\skills" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "File count: $\($files.Count\)"; if \($files.Count -gt 0\) { $files | Select-Object -First 10 FullName })

PowerShell($src = "d:\\agent-project\\灵酝skmint\\.agents\\skills"; $dst = "d:\\agent-project\\灵酝skmint\\.claude\\skills"; Get-ChildItem -Directory "$src" | ForEach-Object { $skillName = $_.Name; $targetDir = "$dst\\$skillName"; if \(-not \(Test-Path "$targetDir"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "$targetDir" | Out-Null }; Write-Host "Moving: $skillName"; robocopy "$src\\$skillName" "$targetDir" /E /MOVE /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS }; Write-Host "Done moving files")

PowerShell($remaining = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File "d:\\agent-project\\灵酝skmint\\.agents" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($remaining.Count -eq 0\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "d:\\agent-project\\灵酝skmint\\.agents"; Write-Host ".agents/ deleted successfully" } else { Write-Host "WARNING: .agents/ still has $\($remaining.Count\) files, not deleting" })

PowerShell(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "d:\\agent-project\\灵酝skmint\\.agents" -ErrorAction Stop; if \(-not \(Test-Path "d:\\agent-project\\灵酝skmint\\.agents"\)\) { Write-Host "✓ .agents/ deleted" } else { Write-Host "✗ still exists" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Filter "SKILL.md" -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Filter "SKILL.md" -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 2>$null | Select-Object -First 5 FullName)
